name: local-code-ai
description: Chat with a local Ollama model, plus refactor and format Go, PowerShell, Rust and JavaScript using local formatters. Auto-applies and saves (no git commits).
author: Alisson Sol et al.

localCodeAI.endpoint.description: Base URL of the local Ollama server.

localCodeAI.model.description: Ollama model (or alias) used for chat and the refactoring pass.

localCodeAI.chatSystemPrompt.default: You are a helpful coding assistant running fully locally inside VS Code. You can see the user's open project and can read its files with the tools you are given: call list_files, read_file, search_text, get_diagnostics or get_active_editor instead of asking the user to paste code. Be concise. Put code in markdown fences.
localCodeAI.chatSystemPrompt.description: System prompt for the chat. The live workspace snapshot is appended to it automatically.

localCodeAI.chatOpenIn.description: Where the chat opens - from 'Local Code AI: Open Chat' and from the activity-bar icon: as an editor tab (movable to any group) or in the side bar. With 'editor', clicking the activity-bar icon opens the tab and closes the side bar.

localCodeAI.chatTools.description: Let the chat model call read-only tools (list_files, read_file, search_text, get_diagnostics, get_active_editor) against the open workspace. Requires a tool-capable model; it is disabled automatically if the model rejects tools.

localCodeAI.chatMaxToolRounds.description: Maximum tool call rounds the chat model may take before it must answer.

localCodeAI.chatContextFileLimit.description: Maximum file paths listed in the workspace snapshot sent with each chat message.

localCodeAI.chatMaxReadKB.description: Maximum size of any single file the chat reads or attaches, in KB.

localCodeAI.maxFilesBeforeWarning.description: Show a confirmation warning before a workspace run that would touch more than this many files. Set high to effectively disable.

localCodeAI.llmPass.description: Run the LLM refactor/comment-cleanup pass after deterministic formatting. Turn off for formatter-only runs.

localCodeAI.temperature.description: Sampling temperature for the LLM pass. Keep low for conservative refactors.

localCodeAI.timeoutSeconds.description: Per-file timeout for the LLM request.

localCodeAI.maxFileKB.description: Files larger than this get the formatter pass only (skipping the LLM pass to avoid context overflow).

localCodeAI.toolsRoot.description: Root folder created by local.code.ai.ps1 (contains tools/paths.json). Empty = use LOCALCODEAI_HOME env var or the platform default.

localCodeAI.ollamaPath.description: Full path to the ollama executable, used by 'Start Model'. Empty = auto-detect (known install locations, then PATH).

localCodeAI.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns excluded from workspace runs.
